{% extends "layouts/base.html" %} {% block content %}

New Vendor

{{ form.hidden_tag() }}
{{ form.name.label }}{{ form.name(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.contact_person.label }}{{ form.contact_person(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.email.label }}{{ form.email(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.phone.label }}{{ form.phone(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.gst_number.label }}{{ form.gst_number(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.address.label }}{{ form.address(class="form-control", rows=2) }}
{{ form.city.label }}{{ form.city(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.state.label }}{{ form.state(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.pincode.label }}{{ form.pincode(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.payment_terms.label }}{{ form.payment_terms(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.lead_time_days.label }}{{ form.lead_time_days(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.submit(class="btn btn-primary mt-3") }} Cancel
{% endblock %}
